summary: Employment History + CV Alignment (NHS-Level) feature testing completed. All backend endpoints working correctly (13/13 tests passed). Frontend UI verified - mismatch warning, View Details modal, Re-extract from CV button all functional in Admin View.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing employee: d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77 (Olakunle Alonge) with mismatch data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employment History + CV Alignment feature fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: (1) POST /api/cv/extract-employment-history endpoint returns 404 for missing file (correct), (2) POST /api/employees/{id}/compare-employment-history detects mismatches correctly, (3) GET /api/employees/{id}/employment-mismatch returns mismatch status with source_of_truth='structured_employment_history', (4) POST /api/employees/{id}/employment-mismatch/add-note adds review notes with validation, (5) Admin View shows amber warning 'Employment history differs from CV' with mismatch count, (6) View Details button opens comparison modal showing side-by-side structured vs CV roles, (7) Re-extract from CV button present and functional, (8) Apply Page has CV prefill notice component (shows only after successful CV extraction), (9) Gap calculation uses ONLY structured employment_history (verified via recruitment-status endpoint).

cv_extraction_endpoint.details: POST /api/cv/extract-employment-history returns 404 for missing file, endpoint accessible

add_mismatch_note_endpoint.details: POST /api/employees/{id}/employment-mismatch/add-note validates note length (min 5 chars), adds review notes

admin_mismatch_warning_ui.details: Amber warning box shows 'Employment history differs from CV' with mismatch count in Recruitment tab

view_details_modal.details: Modal shows 'Employment History vs CV Comparison' title, detected mismatches list, side-by-side comparison, Add Review Note section

reextract_from_cv_button.details: Re-extract from CV button present in mismatch warning section

apply_page_cv_prefill_notice.details: CV prefill notice component exists with data-testid='cv-prefill-notice', shows only after successful CV extraction (correct behavior)

gap_calculation_source_of_truth.details: Recruitment status endpoint uses structured employment_history for gap calculation, not CV extracted roles

authentication_required.details: All mismatch endpoints require authentication (return 401 without token)

mismatch_types_detected: missing_in_structured (Role in CV not in structured history)
missing_in_cv (Role in structured history not in CV)
